description: Rift frequency and intensity scales with player settlement expansion. The more you build and stabilize, the more aggressively the Underearth pushes back. Creates natural tension between expansion and survival — there's no 'safe' endgame state. Only deeper into the dark.
notes: Each settlement structure reduces the rift spawn interval by expansion_penalty_per_structure seconds, up to max_frequency_mod multiplier. Settlements that stop building for multiple days decay toward base_interval at decay_rate. Matches the Dynamic Threat System from lore.
